disease: Diabetes Mellitus (Type 1 + Type 2, with complications and related endpoints)
source_files: pipelines/diabetes/reference/icd_code.sql (ICD-10 ↔ ICD-9 paired diabetes diagnosis codes)
inclusion_logic: Incident diabetes: ≥2 separate claims with qualifying diabetes diagnosis codes on different service dates within a 24-month (730-day) window. Based on a published algorithm combining medication, inpatient discharge, and outpatient visit criteria (ICD-9-CM 250.x1/250.x2/357.2/366.41/362.01–362.07 for inpatient, 250.x0/250.x1/250.x2 and rare supplementary codes 018.7/011.7/015.7/024.57/024.97 for outpatient; ICD-10 equivalents).

cohort_constraints.age_restriction: EL_DOB > 1980-01-01 (≤ ~35 y/o at start of study)

notes: The ICD code.sql pairs list reflects the project's chosen (ICD-10, ICD-9) equivalences. Some ICD-10 entries (E10, EI20) are category or typo'd codes (EI20 likely a typo for I20) — retained here as-is for historical fidelity.
Descriptions are sourced from CDC ICD-10-CM FY2026 and CMS v32 ICD-9-CM diagnosis files. Category-level ICD-10 codes like 'E10' are not in the leaf-code file and show a null-description note.
HCPCS descriptions are from CMS April 2026 HCPC2026_APR_ANWEB.txt.
This code set is the canonical 'known-good' used to validate new lookup results against the existing diabetes SQL pipeline.
